content.text: Phase 1 is active. I'll monitor in a loop, checking every 10 seconds and scaling when phase transitions are detected.

input.command:
# Monitor loop - check every 10 seconds for phase transitions
CURRENT_PHASE=1
SCALED_TO_10=false
SCALED_TO_20=false
SCALED_TO_5=false

for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  echo "=== Check $i ($(date +%H:%M:%S)) ==="
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=20 2>&1)
  echo "$LOGS" | tail -5
  
  # Check for Phase 2
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 2" && [ "$SCALED_TO_10" = "false" ]; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 2 DETECTED - Scaling to 10 workers <<<"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
    SCALED_TO_10=true
    echo "Scale command issued. Current replicas:"
    kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'
    echo ""
  fi
  
  # Check for Phase 3
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 3" && [ "$SCALED_TO_20" = "false" ]; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 3 DETECTED - Scaling to 20 workers <<<"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=20
    SCALED_TO_20=true
    echo "Scale command issued. Current replicas:"
    kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'
    echo ""
  fi
  
  # Check for Phase 4
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 4" && [ "$SCALED_TO_5" = "false" ]; then
    echo ">>> PHASE 4 DETECTED - Scaling back to 5 workers <<<"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=5
    SCALED_TO_5=true
    echo "Scale command issued. Current replicas:"
    kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'
    echo ""
  fi
  
  # Check if traffic generator completed
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -qi "complete\|finished\|done\|PHASE 4.*complete"; then
    echo "Traffic generator appears complete."
  fi
  
  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Monitoring loop done ==="
input.description: Monitor traffic phases and scale workers accordingly

description: Monitor traffic phases and scale workers accordingly
